title: FIXED PRICE
desc: Clear deadlines and a fixed budget. Perfect for projects with specific technical requirements.

title: Time ＆ Material
desc: Hourly-based billing for maximum agility. Ideal for projects with shifting requirements.

title: HYBRID
desc: Base cost + performance bonuses. We share the risks and success together with you.

title: REV. SHARE
desc: Full product immersion. We invest our time and expertise in exchange for a share of the profit.
